segments.text: Despite Dr. Mario's weak recovery, he's making it back!
segments.original_text: 帰ってくるドクターマリオの復帰弱者ながらの

segments.text: All the essence of that recovery is packed right here!
segments.original_text: その復帰の全ての粋がここに詰まっているような

full_text: Despite Dr. Mario's weak recovery, he's making it back! All the essence of that recovery is packed right here! Incredible! Up!
